languages.text: "Нанести удар вовремя — великое искусство, Домин. Неумирающий учит нас выжидать, не поддаваясь импульсам. Пусть ксеносы бьют друг друга — а {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Императорское Таро{/g} подскажет, когда надлежит исполнить волю Его".

traits.locale_text: "Нанести удар вовремя — великое искусство, Домин. Неумирающий учит нас выжидать, не поддаваясь импульсам. Пусть ксеносы бьют друг друга — а {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Императорское Таро{/g} подскажет, когда надлежит исполнить волю Его".

languages.text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."
languages.original_text: "Нанести удар вовремя — великое искусство, Домин. Неумирающий учит нас выжидать, не поддаваясь импульсам. Пусть ксеносы бьют друг друга — а {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Императорское Таро{/g} подскажет, когда надлежит исполнить волю Его".

traits.locale_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the God-Emperor's Tarot will tell us when to do His will."

"Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the God-Emperor's Tarot will tell us when to do His will."

"Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the God-Emperor's Tarot will tell us when to do His will."

languages.text: 「適切なタイミングで攻撃する事は、素晴らしい芸術である、ドミン。不死の者たちは、我々に待つ事を教える。衝動に流されるのではなく。異種族が互いに打ち合うのを、そして{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}神皇帝のタロット{/g}が、神皇帝の意志を遂行する時を告げるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: 「適切なタイミングで攻撃する事は、素晴らしい芸術である、ドミン。不死の者たちは、我々に待つ事を教える。衝動に流されるのではなく。異種族が互いに打ち合うのを、そして神皇帝のタロットが、神皇帝の意志を遂行する時を告げるだろう。」
「適切なタイミングで攻撃する事は、素晴らしい芸術である、ドミン。不死の者たちは、我々に待つ事を教える。衝動に流されるのではなく。異種族が互いに打ち合うのを、そして{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}神皇帝のタロット{/g}が、神皇帝の意志を遂行する時を告げるだろう」

languages.text: «Atacar en el momento adecuado es un arte delicado, Domin. El Inmortal nos enseña a esperar, a no ceder a nuestros impulsos. Dejemos que los xenos se desgasten entre ellos. El {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}tarot del Dios Emperador{/g} nos indicará cuándo hacer su voluntad».
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: «Atacar en el momento adecuado es un arte delicado, Domin. El Inmortal nos enseña a esperar, a no ceder a nuestros impulsos. Dejemos que los xenos se desgasten entre ellos. El {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}tarot del Dios Emperador{/g} nos indicará cuándo hacer su voluntad».

languages.text: “把握时机是一门艺术，秘者。不死之神教导我们忍耐，伺机而动。让异形彼此厮杀吧，待{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}神皇圣牌{/g}显兆，便是吾等践行祂意志之时。”
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: “把握时机是一门艺术，秘者。不死之神教导我们忍耐，伺机而动。让异形彼此厮杀吧，待{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}神皇圣牌{/g}显兆，便是吾等践行祂意志之时。”

languages.text: "Im richtigen Moment zuzuschlagen, ist eine hohe Kunst, Domin. Der Todlose lehrt uns zu warten, anstatt einem Impuls zu folgen. Sollen sich die Xenos gegenseitig töten, bis uns das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Tarot des Gottimperators{/g} gebietet, Seinen Willen zu erfüllen."
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: "Im richtigen Moment zuzuschlagen, ist eine hohe Kunst, Domin. Der Todlose lehrt uns zu warten, anstatt einem Impuls zu folgen. Sollen sich die Xenos gegenseitig töten, bis uns das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Tarot des Gottimperators{/g} gebietet, Seinen Willen zu erfüllen."

languages.text: "Doğru anda vurmak ince bir sanattır Domin. Ölmeyen bize beklemeyi, dürtülere yenilmemeyi öğretir. Bırakalım zenolar birbirini yesin. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un Tarotu{/g}, O'nun iradesini ne zaman yerine getireceğimizi bize söyleyecektir."
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: "Doğru anda vurmak ince bir sanattır Domin. Ölmeyen bize beklemeyi, dürtülere yenilmemeyi öğretir. Bırakalım zenolar birbirini yesin. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un Tarotu{/g}, O'nun iradesini ne zaman yerine getireceğimizi bize söyleyecektir."

languages.text: « Frapper au moment opportun est un art délicat, Domin. L'Immortel nous enjoint à faire preuve de patience, à réprimer nos pulsions. Laissez les xénos s'entretuer. Le {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}tarot de l'Empereur-Dieu{/g} nous dira quand accomplir Sa volonté. »
languages.original_text: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."

traits.locale_text: « Frapper au moment opportun est un art délicat, Domin. L'Immortel nous enjoint à faire preuve de patience, à réprimer nos pulsions. Laissez les xénos s'entretuer. Le {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}tarot de l'Empereur-Dieu{/g} nous dira quand accomplir Sa volonté. »
